Sorbet's legacy parser over-aggressively flattens nested `mlhs` inside `masgn`.
They're semantically meaningful, so this leads to incorrect results:

https://sorbet.run/?arg=--print=desugar-tree&arg=--parser=original#%23!%2Fusr%2Fbin%2Fruby%0A%0Aa%2C%20b%20%3D%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0A%0A%0A%28a%2C%20b%29%20%3D%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0A%0A%0A%28%28a%2C%20b%29%29%20%3D%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%20nil%5D%0AT.reveal_type%28a%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20Integer%281%29%0AT.reveal_type%28b%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20Integer%282%29%20%E2%9D%8C%20wrong%0A%0A%0A%28%28a%2C%20b%29%29%20%3D%20%5B%5B1%2C%20%3Aa%5D%2C%20%5B2%2C%20%3Ab%5D%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%20%3Aa%5D%0AT.reveal_type%28a%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5BInteger%281%29%2C%20Symbol%28%3Aa%29%5D%20%282-tuple%29%20%E2%9D%8C%20wrong%0AT.reveal_type%28b%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5BInteger%282%29%2C%20Symbol%28%3Ab%29%5D%20%282-tuple%29%20%E2%9D%8C%20wrong

Prism gets it right:

https://sorbet.run/?arg=--print=desugar-tree&arg=--parser=prism#%23!%2Fusr%2Fbin%2Fruby%0A%0Aa%2C%20b%20%3D%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0A%0A%0A%28a%2C%20b%29%20%3D%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0A%0A%0A%28%28a%2C%20b%29%29%20%3D%20%5B1%2C%202%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%20nil%5D%0AT.reveal_type%28a%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20Integer%281%29%0AT.reveal_type%28b%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20NilClass%20%E2%9C%85%20correct!%0A%0A%0A%28%28a%2C%20b%29%29%20%3D%20%5B%5B1%2C%20%3Aa%5D%2C%20%5B2%2C%20%3Ab%5D%5D%0Ap%20%5Ba%2C%20b%5D%20%23%20%3D%3E%20%5B1%2C%20%3Aa%5D%0AT.reveal_type%28a%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20Integer%281%29%0AT.reveal_type%28b%29%20%23%20%3D%3E%20Symbol%28%3Aa%29
